text:

[PATCH] net/corosync3: update 2.99.2 to 2.99.5

this patch is still keeping corosync3 under 2.99.x releases;
https://github.com/corosync/corosync/releases/tag/v2.99.5

testport, stage-qa and check-plist: OK

PS: could it be moved to a new port? 'corosync299' or 'corosync2-devel' maybe?
